name: Document Grid – Tag Editor Modal
notes: The modal is entirely self-contained inside the DocumentGrid class component; it duplicates the logic of the standalone TagEditor.jsx functional component that is never actually consumed anywhere.
All modal state lives in DocumentGrid class state: tagEditorVisible, tagEditorDocId, tagEditorTags, tagEditorInput, tagSaving.
Clicking the backdrop overlay closes the modal; click propagation is stopped on the inner modal container to prevent accidental dismissal.
On successful save the local documents array in DocumentGrid state is patched in place (map over id) so the grid reflects the new tags immediately without a full API re-fetch.
